<!-- Generated by the ultracode param-catalog survey (36 agents, 269 params from vllm/ source,
28 adversarially verified). Authoritative for which vLLM v0.23 knobs the autotuner sweeps /
recommends / leaves default / must never emit. Regenerate when bumping the vLLM base. -->

# AUTOTUNER PARAMETER CATALOG — vLLM v0.23 on Ampere (sm80/86) W4A8 hybrid GDN+attn+MoE

Source of truth = the v0.23 worktree at `/home/trevor/vllm-ampere-autotune/vllm/`. Consumer = an autotuner; physics taken as given (decode = bandwidth-bound → only fewer-bytes or MTP move it; prefill = compute-bound; cudagraph = the big GDN lever, +39% agg / +304% single-stream).

---

## 1. TUNABLE LEVERS

### DECODE-tps movers (the honest short list — touch these FIRST)

| Lever | Flag / how set | Default | Regime | Action | Why | Measurable trigger |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| **cudagraph ON** | `--enforce-eager` (master OFF-switch) — keep it OFF | `enforce_eager=False` (graphs on) | both | **recommend** (never eager) | THE biggest decode lever on hybrid-GDN; eager = -39% agg / -304% single-stream | eager-vs-graph A/B → wall-clock tok/s |
| **cudagraph_mode** | `-cc.cudagraph_mode=` JSON (`FULL_AND_PIECEWISE`/`FULL_DECODE_ONLY`/`PIECEWISE`) | effective `FULL_AND_PIECEWISE` (via O2 preset; bare field=None→NONE) | both | **sweep** {FULL_AND_PIECEWISE, FULL_DECODE_ONLY, PIECEWISE} | FULL captures the pure-decode batch as one graph (best decode); FULL_DECODE_ONLY uses less mem | per-stream TPOT + agg tok/s; watch auto-downgrade |
| **MTP / spec-decode K** | `-sc` JSON `num_speculative_tokens` (or `--spec-tokens`) | off (None) | **single/few-session** | **sweep** K∈{1,2,3} | one forward→k tokens breaks the bandwidth wall; **K=2 measured sweet spot** (W4A8-9B 126→158, +25%) | accept-len (target ~2.1–2.3) + decode tok/s |
| **spec method** | `-sc` JSON `method=mtp` (or `--spec-method`) | off | single/few | **recommend** mtp (ngram for repetitive) | mtp is the native-head decode lever for these models | accept-rate >0 (0% = mtp.fc not bf16/not in ignore) |
| **async scheduling** | `--async-scheduling` / `--no-async-scheduling` | None→**auto-ON** for normal generative models | both (agg most) | **recommend** (test `--no-async-scheduling` as the alt) | overlaps scheduler step with model exec, removes inter-iter GPU gaps | step-gap / agg tok/s with vs `--no-` |
| **max-num-seqs** (batch width) | `--max-num-seqs` | CLI None → 256 (Ampere <70GB OpenAI server); fallback 128 | **high-conc aggregate** | **sweep DOWNWARD, gated on OOM** | sets decode batch width → aggregate; per-stream gain small (bandwidth-bound). Mem-tight 27B-W4A8 OOMs at default → proven 32, ceiling ≤82 | OOM at startup/capture; agg tok/s plateau |
| **kv-cache-dtype=fp8** | `--kv-cache-dtype fp8` | `auto` (bf16) | both (long-ctx) | **sweep** {auto, fp8} | fewer KV bytes; **~0% ≤16k, +7–14% @32k, capacity-only @64k**. fp8 is the FREE rival to int8-KV (which is NO-GO) | decode tok/s vs ctx-len curve; verify accuracy (sm80/86 fp8 = emulated/storage) |
| **mamba state dtype** | `--mamba-cache-dtype` / `--mamba-ssm-cache-dtype` | `auto` (bf16 on hybrids) | both (long-ctx) | **sweep** (medium confidence; validate quality) | GDN-state bytes are part of the decode wall; fewer state bytes = the GDN analogue of KV-quant | decode tok/s + quality gate (pair w/ stochastic rounding) |

### PREFILL / TTFT

| Lever | Flag | Default | Regime | Action | Why | Trigger |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| max-num-batched-tokens | `--max-num-batched-tokens` | CLI None → 2048 (Ampere) | high-conc | **sweep** | prefill chunk/compute budget per step; larger = better prefill throughput, more transient mem | TTFT, prefill tok/s vs transient mem |
| VLLM_MARLIN_INPUT_DTYPE=int8 | env | None | both (prefill) | **recommend** (MoE only) | W4A16→W4A8 at serve; int8-act helps compute-bound prefill. **MoE-only, ignored on dense; int8-act coherence checkpoint-dependent (DISPROVEN on the AWQ+GPTQ MoE ckpt)** | prefill tok/s + coherence check |
| VLLM_INT8QK | env (fork patch 0004) | off | single (long-ctx prefill) | **recommend** | int8-QK+fp16-PV prefill for hd256 full-attn hybrids; auto-FA-fallback under cudagraph | chunked TTFT on long prompts (modest ~1.1×) |
| enable-prefix-caching | `--enable-prefix-caching` | None→auto-ON (generate models) | both | **recommend** ON | reuse KV across shared prefixes; big TTFT win on system-prompt/few-shot workloads | TTFT on repeated-prefix traffic |
| mamba-cache-mode=all | `--mamba-cache-mode all` | `none` | both | **recommend** if prefix-caching ON | enables GDN-state prefix reuse (TTFT on repeated prefixes) | repeated-prefix TTFT |
| chunked-prefill | `--enable-chunked-prefill` | auto-ON (hybrid GDN+attn) | both | **recommend** leave ON | lets prefill+decode share a step; disabling warns + forces max-batched-tokens≥max-model-len | — |

### CAPACITY (more concurrency / longer ctx — no per-stream decode gain)

| Lever | Flag | Default | Regime | Action | Why |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| gpu-memory-utilization | `--gpu-memory-utilization` | 0.92 | high-conc | **sweep** (primary capacity) | leftover after weights → KV blocks → concurrency ceiling |
| kv-cache-memory-bytes | `--kv-cache-memory-bytes` | None | both | **recommend** | absolute KV bytes/GPU; overrides gpu-mem-util; precise for mem-tight 27B-W4A8 |
| max-model-len | `--max-model-len` | auto | both | **recommend** | caps per-seq KV footprint; lower = more concurrency |
| kv-offloading-size | `--kv-offloading-size` | None | both (>64k) | **recommend** for long-ctx only | CPU KV buffer (GiB); the V1 replacement for swap_space; PCIe-latency cost |

### QUALITY (recovery knobs — enable only when the paired quant is on)

| Lever | Flag | Default | Action | Why |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| kv-cache-dtype-skip-layers | `--kv-cache-dtype-skip-layers` | none | **recommend** if KV-quant on | keep sensitive layers' KV full-precision |
| mamba stochastic rounding | `--enable-mamba-cache-stochastic-rounding` | off | **recommend** if mamba state reduced | recovers quality from low-precision GDN state, ~0 perf cost |

### Multi-GPU-only (out of general fork scope, but guarded-benchmark candidates)

`--enable-dbo` (+ `--dbo-decode-token-threshold` / `--dbo-prefill-token-threshold` sweep) attacks the dominant no-NVLink TP all-reduce tax via dual-batch overlap (TP>1). `--enable-expert-parallel` for MoE (fewer expert bytes/rank vs PCIe all2all — benchmark, don't blind-sweep). `-sc use_local_argmax_reduction=true` cuts draft all-reduce on no-NVLink TP2. `--numa-bind` cheap host-locality win on multi-socket. These are per-deployment, not line-wide shippable.

---

## 2. LEAVE-DEFAULT / REPORT-ONLY (auto-derived or already-optimal)

**Auto-derived (never set; report the resolved value):**
- `max_num_scheduled_tokens` (= max_num_batched_tokens), `long_prefill_token_threshold` (=int(max_model_len*0.04) only if partial-prefills>1)
- `max_num_encoder_input_tokens` / `encoder_cache_size` (= max_num_batched_tokens, init=False)
- `num_gpu_blocks` (the real capacity OUTPUT, post-profiling), `hash_block_size`, `mamba_page_size_padded`, `sliding_window`, `is_attention_free`
- `cudagraph_capture_sizes` / `max_cudagraph_capture_size` when left None (auto from max_num_seqs/perf-mode/spec-K); `cudagraph_num_of_warmups` (forced to 1 when graphs active)
- `mode` / `cudagraph_mode` / `use_inductor_graph_partition` / `ir_enable_torch_wrap` (resolved from optimization_level)
- `distributed_executor_backend`, `disable_custom_all_reduce`, `disable_nccl_for_dp_synchronization` (resolved per topology)
- spec: `target/draft_model_config`, `draft_parallel_config`, `num_lookahead_tokens` (0/K/K+1), `draft_tensor_parallel_size` (=target TP)
- `dtype` (auto→bf16; 'half' for AWQ), `max_model_len` (auto from config)

**Leave default (already optimal / not a perf knob for this consumer):**
- `--block-size` (16), `--prefix-caching-hash-algo` (sha256), `--mamba-block-size`, `--scheduling-policy` (fcfs), `--stream-interval`, `--long-prefill-token-threshold`, `--max-num-partial-prefills` / `--max-long-partial-prefills`, `--scheduler-reserve-full-isl`, `--disable-hybrid-kv-cache-manager`
- `--optimization-level` (O2 default = correct: VLLM_COMPILE + FULL_AND_PIECEWISE + fusions), `-cc.backend`/`splitting_ops`/`custom_ops`/`use_inductor_graph_partition`/`pass_config` (auto-resolved; manual edits risk downgrade)
- `--seed`, `--max-logprobs`, `--disable-cascade-attn` (already True), `--dtype`, `--quantization` (read from ckpt), `--attention-backend` (auto FLASH_ATTN/FA2)
- `VLLM_ENABLE_FLA_PACKED_RECURRENT_DECODE` (default-on packed GDN decode kernel — A/B only on suspected regression)
- spec: `enforce_eager` (leave None — forcing eager forfeits the cudagraph gain; **the #1 DON'T**), `draft_sample_method` (greedy), `rejection_sample_method` (standard)

**Low-confidence sweep candidates (correctness-sensitive, optional):** `VLLM_SSM_CONV_STATE_LAYOUT` (SD/DS), `VLLM_KV_CACHE_LAYOUT` (NHD/HND), `VLLM_MARLIN_USE_ATOMIC_ADD`, `VLLM_USE_FLASHINFER_SAMPLER` (high-conc only), `VLLM_DISABLE_SHARED_EXPERTS_STREAM` + `VLLM_SHARED_EXPERTS_STREAM_TOKEN_THRESHOLD` (MoE overlap, default 256, vLLM TODO says tune-by-GPU).

---

## 3. AVOID / GUARDRAIL — the tuner must NEVER emit these

**REMOVED-in-V1 / non-existent (emitting = broken restart):**
- `speculative_config.disable_by_batch_size` (and V0 `speculative_disable_by_batch_size`) — **CORRECTION (verify phase, REFUTED): does NOT exist in v0.23, never in git history.** No config knob auto-disables spec above a batch threshold. The empirical batch-~32 cutoff is real runtime behavior but **NOT controllable** — the autotuner must decide spec on/off per QPS regime at startup; it cannot rely on self-disable. (Do not confuse with `disable_padded_drafter_batch`, which is EAGLE padding only.)
- `num_lookahead_slots`, `preemption_mode`, `num_scheduler_steps` / multi-step (explicit removal comment arg_utils.py:1392-1393) — V1 is recompute-only, single-step.
- `swap_space` / `--swap-space` — gone; `LLM()` pops+ignores w/ deprecation. CPU KV is now `--kv-offloading-size`.
- `VLLM_ATTENTION_BACKEND` → renamed to `--attention-backend` (AttentionConfig.backend).
- `VLLM_USE_V1` → gone (V1 is the only engine).
- `VLLM_FLASH_ATTN_VERSION` → renamed to `--attention-config.flash_attn_version` (choices 2|3|4).
- spec `tensor_parallel_size` inside `-sc` → inert TRAP that only raises; use `draft_tensor_parallel_size`.
- `dcp_kv_cache_interleave_size` → deprecated alias of `cp_kv_cache_interleave_size`.
- all2all `pplx`/`naive` → silently remapped to `allgather_reducescatter`.
- `--max-parallel-loading-workers` → parsed but INERT (`__post_init__` logs "will be ignored").

**Deprecated / inert / footgun:**
- `--calculate-kv-scales` (deprecated, removal slated), `--num-gpu-blocks-override` (debug-only), `--kv-sharing-fast-prefill` (explicit no-op WIP), `--override-attention-dtype` (ROCm-only no-op on CUDA).
- `--cpu-offload-gb` — severe decode/prefill bandwidth tax on no-NVLink PCIe; capacity-for-speed.
- `VLLM_DISABLED_KERNELS` — can silently drop Marlin → Exllama/Machete (Machete=Hopper) → huge slowdown/fail. Human-only A/B.
- `VLLM_USE_TRITON_AWQ` — forces slow Triton AWQ off the fast Marlin path.
- `VLLM_BATCH_INVARIANT` — comment requires CC≥9.0; on Ampere effectively unusable. Avoid.

**Hopper/Blackwell-inert on sm80/86 (wasted sweep dimensions — report-only):**
- all `VLLM_USE_FLASHINFER_MOE_*` / `VLLM_FLASHINFER_MOE_BACKEND` (SM90+, mostly deprecated→`--moe-backend`), `VLLM_BLOCKSCALE_FP8_GEMM_FLASHINFER` (SM90+), `VLLM_USE_DEEP_GEMM` / `VLLM_MOE_USE_DEEP_GEMM` / `VLLM_DEEP_GEMM_WARMUP` (Hopper FP8), `VLLM_MXFP4_USE_MARLIN` (~0 MXFP4 save), `VLLM_USE_FBGEMM`→`--linear-backend`, `VLLM_MLA_DISABLE` (non-MLA), trtllm/mnnvl allreduce backends, `VLLM_MULTI_STREAM_GEMM_TOKEN_THRESHOLD` (DeepSeek-V4 only), `VLLM_TUNED_CONFIG_FOLDER` (inert for moe_wna16 — hardcoded CUDA, reads no JSON).

---

## 4. ENV VARS — perf vs infra

**Perf-relevant (sweep/recommend, all static-startup → full-restart trials):**
- `VLLM_MARLIN_INPUT_DTYPE=int8` — W4A16→W4A8 (MoE-only). recommend, coherence-gate.
- `VLLM_INT8QK=1` — int8-QK prefill (fork patch 0004). recommend for long-ctx single-stream.
- `PYTORCH_CUDA_ALLOC_CONF=expandable_segments:True` — fragmentation-OOM relief on mem-tight W4A8. **recommend** (rejected only with pinned-KV connectors unless cumem on).
- `VLLM_MARLIN_USE_ATOMIC_ADD`, `VLLM_USE_FLASHINFER_SAMPLER` (high-conc), `VLLM_DISABLE_SHARED_EXPERTS_STREAM` + `..._TOKEN_THRESHOLD`, `VLLM_SSM_CONV_STATE_LAYOUT`, `VLLM_KV_CACHE_LAYOUT` — low-confidence sweep.
- `VLLM_FLOAT32_MATMUL_PRECISION` (highest default = no TF32; high/medium enable TF32) — quality-leaning, low confidence.

**Infra / startup / correctness (leave default):**
- `VLLM_DISABLE_COMPILE_CACHE`, `VLLM_COMPILE_CACHE_SAVE_FORMAT`, `VLLM_USE_STANDALONE_COMPILE`, `VLLM_USE_AOT_COMPILE`, `VLLM_ENABLE_PREGRAD_PASSES`, `VLLM_ENABLE_INDUCTOR_MAX_AUTOTUNE` / `..._COORDINATE_DESCENT_TUNING` (startup-cost only), `VLLM_ENABLE_CUDAGRAPH_GC`, `VLLM_MEMORY_PROFILER_ESTIMATE_CUDAGRAPHS` (leave on — off can OOM at capture), `VLLM_ENABLE_V1_MULTIPROCESSING`, `VLLM_V1_OUTPUT_PROC_CHUNK_SIZE`, `VLLM_COMPUTE_NANS_IN_LOGITS` (debug).
- TP-only/deployment: `VLLM_ALLREDUCE_USE_SYMM_MEM`, `VLLM_USE_NCCL_SYMM_MEM`, `VLLM_DP_*`.

**Note:** cudagraph — the BIG lever — is NOT an env var; it is `--enforce-eager` / `-cc.cudagraph_mode` / capture-size CLI. The cudagraph *env* toggles (`VLLM_USE_BREAKABLE_CUDAGRAPH`, `VLLM_ENABLE_CUDAGRAPH_GC`) are second-order/avoid.

---

## 5. PER-REGIME CHEAT-SHEET

**High-concurrency aggregate (max total tok/s across many streams):**
- Keep cudagraph ON; `cudagraph_mode=FULL_AND_PIECEWISE`.
- `--async-scheduling` ON (default; verify vs `--no-`).
- **Sweep `--max-num-seqs` UP toward batch ceiling, gated on OOM** (mem-tight 27B-W4A8: cap ~32, line ceiling ≤82); sweep `--gpu-memory-utilization` up (0.92→0.95) and `--max-num-batched-tokens` up for prefill throughput.
- Spec-decode **OFF** above ~batch-32 (extra draft compute hurts aggregate; no auto-disable exists — decide at startup).
- Consider `VLLM_USE_FLASHINFER_SAMPLER`, MoE shared-experts-stream threshold. TP>1: try `--enable-dbo`.

**Single / few-session (per-stream latency / decode tok/s):**
- Keep cudagraph ON; sweep `cudagraph_mode` {FULL_AND_PIECEWISE, **FULL_DECODE_ONLY**}; `performance_mode=interactivity` for dense 1..32 capture sizes.
- **MTP K=2** (`-sc method=mtp num_speculative_tokens=2`) — the #1 single-stream lever (+25% W4A8); ensure mtp.fc bf16 + in ckpt `ignore` (`re:.*mtp.*`) or accept=0%.
- `--max-num-seqs` LOW (frees mamba-state cache mem, fits bigger graphs).
- Long-ctx single-stream: `--kv-cache-dtype fp8` (+7–14% @32k, capacity @64k), `VLLM_INT8QK=1` (long prompt TTFT), `--kv-offloading-size` @>64k.
- **NEVER** `speculative_config.enforce_eager` (forfeits cudagraph — the #1 DON'T).

---

### Corrections the verify phase made (flagged inline above)
1. **`speculative_config.disable_by_batch_size` REFUTED** — does not exist in v0.23 (nor git history); no batch-size auto-disable for spec. Autotuner must gate spec at startup per regime. (Project-memory "GOTCHA3" = a V0 concept with no V1 knob.)
2. **`max-num-seqs` citation fix** — the enum claim "scheduler.py:63 DEFAULT_MAX_NUM_SEQS=44" is wrong: constant is at scheduler.py:44 with value **128**; line 63 is the field decl. CLI default None → 256 (Ampere <70GB OpenAI/LLM); throughput perf-mode ×2 only if user left it unset.
3. **`async_scheduling` default REFUTED** — None does NOT mean off; it **auto-resolves to ON** (vllm.py:957-997) for normal generative models. Autotuner should test `--no-async-scheduling` as the alternative, not assume off is baseline.
4. **`cudagraph_mode` default mechanism** — bare field None resolves to **NONE** (compilation.py:1340-1342); FULL_AND_PIECEWISE is the effective default only via the O2 preset (vllm.py:257/366). Net default correct, mechanism was misstated.
5. **No `-O` short alias** in v0.23 — only `--optimization-level`; `-O0..-O3` are docstring shorthand. Set cudagraph via `-cc`/`--compilation-config`.
6. **`VLLM_ATTENTION_BACKEND` / `VLLM_USE_V1` / `VLLM_FLASH_ATTN_VERSION` all REMOVED** — use `--attention-backend`, (no toggle), `--attention-config.flash_attn_version`.
